name: LoyaltyLion E-commerce Loyalty API
what_it_does: LoyaltyLion e-commerce loyalty REST API for Shopify, Magento, and BigCommerce merchants to build and manage loyalty programs with points, tiers, rewards, and referrals that integrate natively with e-commerce platforms for customer retention and lifetime value improvement. Enables AI agents to manage loyalty member enrollment for e-commerce retention automation, handle point accrual and activity events for loyalty earning automation, access tier management and upgrade for DTC loyalty progression automation, retrieve reward redemption and coupon generation for checkout discount automation, manage referral tracking and reward for viral customer acquisition automation, handle loyalty analytics and member insights for retention optimization automation, access email and notification trigger for loyalty engagement automation, retrieve customer loyalty status for personalization automation, manage points adjustment and correction for customer service automation, and integrate LoyaltyLion with Shopify, Klaviyo, Yotpo, and e-commerce ecosystems for end-to-end loyalty automation.
use_cases: Enrolling customers in Shopify loyalty programs from e-commerce retention agents
Triggering points for purchase events from DTC loyalty automation agents
Generating tier-based discount codes from loyalty progression agents
Tracking referral conversions from customer acquisition loyalty agents
not_for: Enterprise omnichannel loyalty with physical stores (use Antavo for enterprise omnichannel)
Complex rule-based promotion engine (use Talon.One or Voucherify for complex rules)
Non-Shopify/Magento platforms (LoyaltyLion is e-commerce platform native)
best_when: A Shopify or Magento DTC brand wanting AI agents to automate loyalty program management, points accrual, tier progression, and referral tracking integrated natively with their e-commerce platform through LoyaltyLion's DTC-native loyalty API.
avoid_when: ACTIVITY POINTS REQUIRE PLATFORM EVENT MAPPING: LoyaltyLion points accrual depends on platform events (order placed, review written) mapped to activities; automated points for custom events must configure custom activity rules; automated custom event without activity mapping creates event ignored and no points awarded. COUPON UNIQUENESS PER REDEMPTION: LoyaltyLion reward redemption generates unique single-use coupon codes; automated redemption must handle coupon creation latency; automated immediate coupon use before code propagates to Shopify creates coupon not found at checkout. RATE LIMITS ON ACTIVITY EVENTS: LoyaltyLion activity event APIs have per-minute rate limits; automated high-volume event ingestion (bulk historical import) must throttle requests; automated bulk event import without throttling creates rate limit exceeded and activity import failure. LOYALTY EMAIL TRIGGERS ARE PLATFORM-NATIVE: LoyaltyLion loyalty notifications often use Klaviyo or Shopify Email integration; automated loyalty email is not via LoyaltyLion API directly; automated email integration requires configuring LoyaltyLion-Klaviyo connection rather than direct API email call.

auth.notes: LoyaltyLion uses API token for authentication. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Founded 2012 by Charlie Casey and Dave Clark. Bootstrapped (profitable). Products: Points engine, tier management, referrals, rewards catalog, Shopify/Magento integration, Klaviyo integration. No public SDK. GDPR. Shopify Plus Partner. Serves DTC brands and e-commerce merchants. Competes with Smile.io and Yotpo Loyalty.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — paid plans from $359/month
pricing.paid_tiers: Small: $359/month; Medium: $729/month; Large: custom; based on active members
pricing.notes: London UK. Bootstrapped/profitable. Monthly subscription by active member count. Shopify Plus plans available.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; activity and member APIs throttled per minute; webhooks for points, tier, and redemption events

known_agent_gotchas: ACTIVITY CONFIGURATION IN DASHBOARD REQUIRED: LoyaltyLion point-earning activities (purchase, review, birthday) must be configured in dashboard before API events trigger points; automated event sending without activity configuration creates event accepted but no points awarded without error indication

COUPON CODE PROPAGATION LATENCY: LoyaltyLion reward redemption generates Shopify coupon codes via Shopify API; automated checkout using generated coupon must account for Shopify coupon propagation time; automated immediate coupon use creates coupon not yet active at checkout

MEMBER LOOKUP BY CUSTOMER EMAIL: LoyaltyLion member operations use customer email as primary identifier; automated member lookup must use correct email; automated email case mismatch creates member not found even when member exists

HISTORICAL POINTS IMPORT RATE LIMIT: LoyaltyLion bulk activity import for historical data has strict per-minute rate limits; automated historical import must batch requests and respect rate limits; automated high-volume historical import creates HTTP 429 and partial import failure

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VERIFICATION: LoyaltyLion webhooks include HMAC signature header; automated webhook processing must verify signature; automated unverified webhook processing creates spoofed loyalty event acceptance vulnerability
agent_readiness.security_notes: E-commerce loyalty. GDPR. API token. EU/US. Customer loyalty and purchase behavior data.

security_score_components.security_notes: E-commerce loyalty. GDPR. API token. EU/US. Customer loyalty and behavioral data.
